author: Disney Parks YouTube
text:
Full Resort & Room Tour: Disney's All-Star Sports Resort | Walt Disney World
Explore one of Walt Disney World’s most playful stays! 🏀✨

Step inside Disney’s All-Star Sports Resort at Walt Disney World Resort for a complete resort and room tour—from larger-than-life sports theming to recently updated guest rooms designed for comfort and convenience.

🏨 What you’ll see in this tour:
Resort overview & themed areas
Pools & recreation
Dining and amenities
Full guest room walkthrough
Helpful tips for your stay
In this video, we’ll take you on a full walkthrough of the resort grounds, showing off its bold, field-inspired design, themed pools, dining options, and everything you need to know before your stay. Then, head inside a standard room to see how this value resort brings together fun Disney details with modern touches—perfect for relaxing after a day in the parks.

Whether you're planning your next visit or just dreaming of your stay, this guide has you covered. 🌟

00:00-00:15 - Welcome to Disney’s All-Star Sports Resort
00:16-00:49 - Lobby/Check in
00:50-04:37 - Standard Room
04:38-05:37 - Surfboard Bay Pool
05:38-06:01 - Grand Slam Pool
06:02-07:31 - End Zone Food Court
07:32-07:49 - Grandstand Spirits
07:50-08:14 - Resort Activities
08:15-08:33 - Around the Resort
08:34-08:54 - Playground
08:55-09:56 - Sport Goofy Gifts and Sundries
09:57-10:22 - Visit planDisney.com for more!

Start planning your next getaway and discover why the magic begins the moment you check in.

SUBSCRIBE: http://di.sn/6002ODIEQ

About Walt Disney World:
At Walt Disney World, you've got a whole fantastic world to celebrate in! With four spectacular theme parks and two water parks plus the most amazing shopping, dining, and recreation magic imaginable, it's no wonder all of life's special moments are made even more enjoyable when you celebrate at Walt Disney World.
